{{Quote|If somebody traps you with a Universal Energy Cage, you can forget about escape. And if somebody is using this kind of restraint on you, you can probably forget about ''breathing'' for much longer....|"[[Jjerrol]]"|<ref name="GFT">''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''</ref>}}
'''Universal Energy Cages''' were designed by [[Umak Leth]] at the start of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].

==Description==
Universal energy cages measured approximately three [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in diameter, and were floating spheres constructed of reinforced [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] bars. A [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] unit allowed the cage to move, with a top speed of forty-five [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]]. A handheld controller with a range of one hundred meters was linked to the cage, directing its movement and allowing a guard to control the intensity of the integrated [[Force field/Legends|force field]] and [[Stun/Legends|stun]] charges.<ref name="EGWT" />

Designed by [[Engineer/Legends|Junior Engineer]] [[Umak Leth]],<ref name="DESB" /> the universal energy cage was intended to restrain a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and keep them immobile.<ref name="EGWT" /> Leth worked on the principle that if [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] was an energy field, then the most efficient way to counter its use was not to block it, but to disrupt and overwhelm it with the introduction of more energy.<ref name="DESB" />

An elaborate system of overlapping [[superconductive coil]]s covered the entire cage in an energy [[Force field/Legends|force field]]<ref name="EGWT" /> similar to those used to contain ionized [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] within a [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]].<ref name="DESB" /> This field interrupted a Jedi's ability to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]; the more power the Jedi attempted to employ against the field, the more intense the output from the field to counter it.<ref name="EGWT" />

[[Repulsorlift generator/Legends|Repulsorlift generators]] were located at the top and bottom of the sphere to hold the captive in place inside a [[Repulsor field/Legends|repulsor field]]. An additional security measure to prevent a Jedi from escaping was a contact [[Shock field/Legends|shock field]] that was maintained along the interior surface of the cage. The intensity of the shock field could be adjusted, allowing a guard to increase its size and range within the cage to affect the captive and render them unconscious if they were deemed to be a threat.<ref name="EGWT" />

Additional superconductive coils and repulsorlift generators were used during the process of loading and unloading a [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] from the cage. Placed near the cage's sliding access bars, these additional units allowed the universal energy cage's force field and repulsor field to be projected up to ten meters outside of the confines of the cage, keeping the captive immobile and suppressing their [[Force power/Legends|powers]].<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
[[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Valin Draco]] captured [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Vhiin Thorla]] during the Great Jedi Purge using such a cage.<ref name="EotJ">{{DoD|Echoes of the Jedi}}</ref>

[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] were both detained in such a cage en route to the reborn [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].<ref name="DE">''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]''</ref>

The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] defector [[Elan]] and her familiar [[Vergere]] were transported to [[Nim Drovis]] in an energy cage.<ref name="AoC1">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''</ref>
